MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Marta Eisenberg appeared by zoom for Olga Hovland.

Mrs. Eisenberg stated that she does not yet have the source documents to prepare the accounting, that her client was unable to get the documents to her, that her clients' son has been ill and requested an eight-week continuance. Status on filing of the fifth accounting is continued to September 3, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jones. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-10-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nancy Rasch for and with Michael Hovland and Olga Hovland.

Ms. Rasch stated that the account has been made whole, that it is an interest bearing account in Olga's name alone, and that total expenses are about $83,000.00 for court fees, attorney fees, bond, doctors, etc. which include $70,000.00 for the purchase of a van. Ms. Hovland stated that she now reviews monthly statements. The Court suggested more than one account (two separate accounts). The Court will set a one year accounting (hearing date to be reflected in the order). The Court granted the First Account and Report of Co-Trustees, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
